title: Kimi Code, our open-source coding agent, just got a major upgrade!
summary: Kimi Code is an open-source coding agent with one-line CLI installation and zero setup. It supports video-to-code conversion, plugins for stocks and financial reports, IDE integrations via the ACP protocol with JetBrains and Zed, and hooks for custom tools.
